calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-09-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-09-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Danaiel Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Martin Luther King/Marcus Garvey Square Coop. Apts., Inc.
Plaintiff's authorized agent/acting manager: Lawinia Marlin is also present.
John Weinstein, Esq. for Defendants: Russell Quinn and Jason Quinn, all present in court.
Parties settled, stipulation for entry of future judgment signed by parties, filed in court, but not read into the record.
Parties agreed to terms of the settlement by stipulation in open court.
Matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-21-2005 Continued To Apr-25-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2005 Continued To May-09-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JONATHAN BORNSTEIN FOR PLAINTIFF MARTIN LUTHER KING/MARCUS GARVEY SQUARE COOP.APTS
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RUSSELL QUINN AND JASON QUINN

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND SRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

MR. WEINSTEIN APPEARED FOR DEFENDANT RUSSELL QUINN, HOWEVER NO SUBSTITUTION HAS BEEN SIGNED OR FILED. COMMISSIONER SUGGESTED THAT COUNSEL TRY TO WORK THINGS OUT PRIOR TO TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
